2605.00365.title: Uniform-Correct Policy Optimization: Breaking RLVR's Indifference to Diversity
2605.00365.paper_summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has achieved substantial gains in single-attempt accuracy (Pass@1) on reasoning tasks, yet often suffers from reduced multi-sample coverage (Pass@K), indicating diversity collapse. We identify a structural cause for this degradation: common RLVR objectives, such as GRPO, are indifferent to how probability mass is distributed among correct solutions. Combined with stochastic training dynamics, this indifference induces a self-reinforcing collapse, in which probability mass concentrates on a narrow subset of correct outputs while alternative valid solutions are suppressed. We formalize this collapse mechanism and further characterize the optimal policy structure under two complementary criteria: robustness and entropy-regularized optimality, which identify the Uniform-Correct Policy as uniquely optimal. Motivated by this analysis, we propose Uniform-Correct Policy Optimization (UCPO), a modification to GRPO that adds a conditional uniformity penalty on the policy's distribution over correct solutions. The penalty redistributes gradient signal toward underrepresented correct responses, encouraging uniform allocation of probability mass within the correct set. Across three models (1.5B-7B parameters) and five mathematical reasoning benchmarks, UCPO improves Pass@K and diversity while maintaining competitive Pass@1, achieving up to +10\% absolute improvement on AIME24 at Pass@64 and up to 45\% higher equation-level diversity within the correct set. The code is available at https://github.com/AnamikaLochab/UCPO.
2605.00365.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習與可驗證獎勵（RLVR）在推理任務上的單次嘗試準確率（Pass@1）取得了顯著的提升，但通常會遭遇多樣性崩潰，導致多樣性覆蓋率（Pass@K）降低。我們確定了這一退化的結構性原因：常見的 RLVR 目標，如 GRPO，對於正確解的概率質量如何分佈漠不關心。結合隨機訓練動態，這種漠不關心會引發自我強化的崩潰，其中概率質量集中在狹窄的正確輸出子集上，而其他有效的解則被壓制。我們形式化了這一崩潰機制，並進一步在兩個互補標準下特徵化最佳策略結構：魯棒性和熵正則化最優性，這些標準將均勻正確策略識別為唯一的最佳策略。基於這一分析，我們提出了均勻正確策略優化（UCPO），這是一種對 GRPO 的修改，添加了對策略在正確解上的分佈的條件均勻性懲罰。該懲罰將梯度信號重新分配到代表性不足的正確回應上，鼓勵在正確集內均勻分配概率質量。在三個模型（1.5B-7B 參數）和五個數學推理基準上，UCPO 改進了 Pass@K 和多樣性，同時保持競爭力的 Pass@1，在 AIME24 的 Pass@64 上實現了高達 +10\% 的絕對提升，並在正確集內實現了高達 45\% 的方程級別多樣性提升。代碼可在 https://github.com/AnamikaLochab/UCPO 獲得。
2605.00365.author: Anamika Lochab et.al.
2605.00365.authors: Anamika Lochab, Bolian Li, Ruqi Zhang
